channel.title: Collection on A Gauge of the Forgotten Past
channel.description: Recent content in Collection on A Gauge of the Forgotten Past

item.title: Sample Film One
item.description:
A compilation documentary highlighting infrastructure and agriculture projects in the early 1970s. This sample entry demonstrates how the metadata table and prose description appear on a single collection page.

Provenance

Acquired by donation, 2021. This field documents where the print came from and its custodial history.

Interpretive note

Use this section for short scholarly or curatorial commentary — what the film reveals about circulation, audience, or historical context.

Condition

Reel 1 is in excellent condition. Reel 2 has a visible heat-damaged section approximately 2 minutes in. Splices at head and tail are intact.

item.title: Sample Film Two
item.description:
A short newsreel produced in 1976 — typical of the newsreel-style shorts distributed to rural projection teams during this period.

Provenance

Donated by a former rural projectionist, 2019.

Interpretive note

Brief newsreels like this one were designed to lead into longer programs at mobile projection events. They circulated quickly and were often retained on the reel shelf for reuse across multiple screenings.
